buildCommand: rm -rf docs/.mintlify/skills/draft-sep && mkdir -p docs/.mintlify/skills/draft-sep public && cp plugins/mcp-spec/skills/draft-sep/SKILL.md docs/.mintlify/skills/draft-sep/SKILL.md && cd docs && npx mint export --output ../public/docs.zip && cd ../public && unzip -q docs.zip && rm docs.zip
